warnings.message: Primary front activated at snapshot 1 with detector score 0.0469.
No breakout time was inferred from the tracked primary front within the active time window.
XRD uses isotropic compression only; crystallographic texture, preferred orientation, and phase changes are not modeled.
k*lambda_D >= 1, so the selected state is in a non-collective scattering regime.
Transmission is a Thomson-only quick-look estimate; detailed photoabsorption and warm-dense-matter opacity physics are not included.
Spectroscopy is a line-of-sight quick look: no line formation, emissivity, or opacity model is included.
